task_completion.description: Verify that the basic store settings (address and currency) are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the WooCommerce Settings -> General tab showing the address as '415 Westlake Avenue, Seattle, WA 98109, United States' and the Currency set to 'United States (US) dollar' (USD).

task_completion.description: Verify that taxes are enabled and the correct rate is applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the WooCommerce Settings -> Tax tab showing a standard tax rate created for State Code 'WA' with a Rate % of '6.5000' and Tax Name 'WA Sales Tax'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the shipping zone and methods are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the WooCommerce Settings -> Shipping tab showing a zone named 'Domestic US' (Region: United States) containing two methods: 'Flat rate' ($5.99) and 'Free shipping' (Requires minimum order amount of $75).

task_completion.description: Verify that the promotional coupon is created with the correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Marketing -> Coupons page showing a coupon code 'GRANDOPENING' (or 'grandopening') with a 'Percentage discount' of 20%, a usage limit of 500, and an expiry date of December 31, 2026.

task_completion.description: Verify that the product categories and the 'Bag Size' attribute are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of Products -> Categories showing 'Single Origin' (with subcategories 'African' and 'Americas'), 'Blends', and 'Equipment'. Also look for Products -> Attributes showing 'Bag Size' with terms '250g', '500g', and '1kg'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 3 simple equipment products are added with correct prices and categories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Products list or individual product pages showing 'Hario V60 Dripper' ($32.00), 'Baratza Encore Grinder' ($169.99), and 'Fellow Stagg Kettle' ($89.95), all assigned to the 'Equipment' category and marked as 'In stock'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 3 variable coffee products are created with 'Bag Size' variations and correct per-size pricing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Products list or the Variations tab for 'Ethiopian Yirgacheffe', 'Colombian Supremo', and 'Morning Symphony'. Evidence must show they are 'Variable products', use the 'Bag Size' attribute for variations, and have specific prices set for 250g, 500g, and 1kg sizes as per the CSV.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce admin web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin) loaded in a web browser, with the agent clicking through menus and filling out forms.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the agent using `wp-cli` commands, executing SQL queries, or running automated scripts in the terminal to configure the store or insert products directly into the database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely interacted with the product creation and settings pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture intermediate steps like typing in product names, setting prices, generating variations, or saving settings, rather than just showing the final result magically appearing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Store Address: 415 Westlake Avenue, Seattle, WA 98109, US. Currency: USD. Tax: Enabled, 6.5% rate for WA state. Shipping: Zone 'Domestic US', Flat Rate $5.99, Free Shipping min $75. Coupon: GRANDOPENING (or grandopening), 20% percentage discount, 500 usage limit, expires 2026-12-31. Categories: Single Origin (children: African, Americas), Blends, Equipment. Attribute: 'Bag Size' with terms 250g, 500g, 1kg. Variable Products (Coffee): Ethiopian Yirgacheffe (SKU: SR-ETH-001, Cat: African, Prices: 250g=$14.99, 500g=$26.99, 1kg=$48.99); Colombian Supremo (SKU: SR-COL-002, Cat: Americas, Prices: 250g=$13.99, 500g=$24.99, 1kg=$44.99); Morning Symphony (SKU: SR-BLD-001, Cat: Blends, Prices: 250g=$12.99, 500g=$22.99, 1kg=$41.99). Simple Products (Equipment): Hario V60 Dripper (SKU: SR-EQP-001, Price: $32.00); Baratza Encore Grinder (SKU: SR-EQP-002, Price: $169.99); Fellow Stagg Kettle (SKU: SR-EQP-003, Price: $89.95).
